# W3C XML Conformance Fixture Manifest

M5 records conformance provenance and a data-only curated manifest. It does not
vendor the upstream W3C XML Test Suite payload.

- Source: https://www.w3.org/XML/Test/
- License terms reference: https://www.w3.org/copyright/test-suites-licenses/
- Retrieved date: 2026-05-09
- Import mode: metadata plus curated inline XML strings only
- Execution rule: fixture entries are parsed as data; no fixture file is ever
  executed as code or script.
